title: Animals herding
description: Animals follow each other! A cool mod that makes animals follow each other, in a group. The animals will walk with every other animal from their group, which will make it look like real life animal behaviour!
body:
# **Animal Herding** 🐄🐑🐖 - Intelligent Animal Grouping Mod

## **🌟 Overview**
**Animal Herding** is a **game-changing Minecraft mod** that introduces **realistic animal grouping behavior** to transform your world into a **living, breathing ecosystem**. Watch as animals of the same species **naturally form dynamic herds**, **follow intelligent leaders**, and **stick together** for protection, socialization, and survival!

---

## **🔥 CORE FEATURES**

### **🐄 Natural Herding System** 
- **Automatic group formation** - Animals instantly recognize and join same-species herds
- **Dynamic herd management** - Groups form, grow, and disband organically
- **Species-specific behavior** - Each animal type has unique herding characteristics

### **👑 Intelligent Leadership** 
- **Natural leader selection** - The strongest/oldest animal becomes herd leader
- **Strategic decision making** - Leaders choose optimal paths and grazing areas
- **Emergency response** - Leaders alert herd to danger and coordinate escape

### **🧭 Advanced Navigation**
- **Smart spacing system** - Animals maintain perfect following distances
- **Obstacle avoidance** - Herds navigate around obstacles intelligently
- **Terrain adaptation** - Different movement patterns for various terrains

### **🌍 Multi-Species Ecosystem**
- **All vanilla animals supported** - Cows, sheep, pigs, chickens, horses, and more!
- **Cross-species awareness** - Animals recognize and avoid predator species
- **Breed-specific behaviors** - Each species has unique herding patterns

### **⚡ Performance Optimized**
- **Server-side processing** - Zero client-side performance impact
- **Efficient tick management** - Minimal CPU usage even with large herds
- **Smart entity tracking** - Only active herds are processed

### **🎮 Multiplayer Ready**
- **Full server compatibility** - Works seamlessly on multiplayer servers
- **Synchronized behavior** - All players see identical herd behavior
- **Lag-resistant design** - Network-friendly implementation

---

## **🔄 How It Works**

### **Automatic Integration**
- **New animals automatically detect** and join existing herds
- **Natural hierarchy formation** - Leaders emerge organically
- **Distance-based grouping** - Animals within 16 blocks form natural groups

### **Herd Dynamics**
- **Cohesive movement** - Herds stay together while exploring
- **Protective behavior** - Young animals stay near parents and group center
- **Environmental adaptation** - Herds respond to weather and time of day

### **Technical Excellence**
- **100% server-side operation** - No client modifications needed
- **Forge event-based** - Clean integration with Minecraft's systems
- **Error-resistant design** - Automatic recovery from edge cases

---
